mapper.sql: select r.rule_id, r.family_id, f.family_name, r.member_id, m.member_name, r.asset_id, a.asset_name, r.rule_name, r.rule_type, r.threshold_value, r.second_threshold_value, r.enabled, r.suggestion_text, r.last_triggered_time, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark from fin_alert_rule r left join fin_family f on f.family_id = r.family_id left join fin_member_account m on m.member_id = r.member_id left join fin_asset a on a.asset_id = r.asset_id
mapper.select: where r.del_flag = '0' and r.enabled = '1' order by r.rule_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into fin_alert_rule( family_id, member_id, asset_id, rule_name, rule_type, threshold_value, second_threshold_value, enabled, suggestion_text, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{familyId}, #{memberId}, #{assetId}, #{ruleName}, #{ruleType}, #{thresholdValue}, #{secondThresholdValue}, #{enabled}, #{suggestionText}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update fin_alert_rule set last_triggered_time = sysdate() where rule_id = #{ruleId}
